$schema: Per-section budget for raw `<input>` and `<button>` elements that have NOT been migrated to the shared components/ui primitives. The number is the count, captured at the end of PR 9. The check fails when a section's count goes UP (drift toward inline) OR DOWN (progress unrecorded — drop the threshold to lock in the win).

AdminUsersSection.tsx.reason: Fully migrated in PR 2 (pilot). All form inputs use FormField + TextInput, all buttons use PrimaryButton / IconButton.

AppearanceSection.tsx.reason: Theme-toggle cards use a single aria-pressed `<button>` per option. ToggleCard primitive would have one consumer; not extracted.

BaselinesSection.tsx.reason: Largest Settings section (1948 LOC) with deeply custom UI: per-tier rate inputs, version timeline, refresh-pricing modal, archived-tab swap, bulk-tier-adjust dialog, and the SolarTech ↔ Product Catalog parity surfaces. PR 1 wired the inline validateProductName to the shared validateName; full primitive migration is deferred to a dedicated multi-PR effort because the surface is too risky to migrate in one shot.

BlitzPermissionsSection.tsx.reason: PR 8 migrated the search bar. Remaining buttons: 4 role-filter pills (custom segmented control with gradient highlight), 2 toggle switches per row (custom 9x5 switch UI), 2 bulk-action subtle-tinted buttons (Grant/Revoke). All are custom patterns with one consumer each.

CustomizationSection.tsx.reason: PR 5 migrated everything to primitives; +1 button bump in 2026-04-29 added a custom toggle switch for the stalled-digest enable flag (same pattern as InstallerHandoffPanel toggle; no shared toggle primitive yet).

ExportSection.tsx.reason: PR 8 migrated the date inputs and the Download CSV button. Remaining: 4 selectable export-cards (custom multi-select with hover-lift) and 1 'Clear dates' subtle text-button. SelectableCard would have one consumer.

FinancersSection.tsx.reason: PR 6 migrated the add-form, search, and row-hover icon buttons. Remaining: select-mode toggle button, 'Select all' link in the active+archived list headers, archived-section disclosure ChevronDown button. All custom multi-select choreography.

InstallersSection.tsx.reason: PR 9 migrated the add-form, search, and empty state. Remaining 4 inputs: 3 micro-text (text-xs) inline-edit inputs in the prepaid-options panel and pay-schedule edit, 1 family-name input in the PC-mode add form. Remaining buttons: standard/PC segmented selector (2), select-mode toggle (1), select-all (1), archived-section disclosure (1), row-hover icon stagger (5 per active row including the new BVI-handoff Mail button, 2 per archived row), prepaid-options expansion add/edit/save/cancel/delete (5), pay-schedule expansion (varies). +1 button bump in 2026-04-29 added the Mail icon for handoff config.

InstallerHandoffPanel.tsx.reason: Per-installer handoff email config editor (added 2026-04-29 for BVI integration). Inputs/textarea use TextInput/FormField primitives. The 1 raw button is a custom toggle switch (handoffEnabled on/off) — same pattern as BlitzPermissionsSection toggle pills; no shared toggle primitive yet.

PMSection.tsx.reason: PR 7 migrated the add-form and row-delete. Remaining 1 button: 3 permission-toggle pills per PM row (Create Deals / Blitz / Export); these are custom toggle-pill UI.
